subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory belong to those who have immersed themselves in the ocean of detachment, whom neither the calumnies of the world nor the wealth of nations can deter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر و بها مخصوص متغمسین لجه بحر انقطاع است که مفتریات عالم و ثروت امم ایشان را
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection
